summary: Matched sysdolphin/baselib/video.c by replacing asm/sysdolphin/baselib/video.s with C, wiring obj_files.mk to build the new C object, and cleaning up the surrounding SDK/baselib type surface needed for the match. The PR also renamed several formerly address-like HSD_Video symbols to descriptive HSD_VI APIs, introduced real HSD_VIInfo/HSD_VIStatus/XFB/EFB state types, corrected Dolphin VI/GX prototypes, and adjusted CObj camera code to use HSD_VIGetRenderMode rather than treating HSD_VIData as a raw GXRenderModeObj. PR body explicitly notes that fixing the fakematch of GXSetDispCopySrc exposed an invalid cast, which was addressed by giving GXSetDispCopySrc/GXSetDispCopyDst and related GX framebuffer functions more accurate signatures.

key_files.role: New matched C implementation for baselib video, replacing the deleted assembly file.
Deleted 1334-line assembly implementation after video.c matched.
Expanded video API/types: HSD_VIInfo, HSD_VIStatus refinements, XFB/EFB status enums, callbacks, helper accessors, render pass constants.
Switched build from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/video.s.o to src/sysdolphin/baselib/video.c.o.
Corrected GX framebuffer function signatures and parameter types, including GXSetDispCopySrc and GXSetDispCopyDst.
Updated public prototypes for GXCopyDisp, GXSetCopyFilter, GXSetDispCopyDst, GXSetDispCopySrc, GXSetCopyClear.
Added GXFBClamp enum used by HSD_VICopyEFB2XFBPtr.
Added VI TV-format constants, callback typedefs, VIPadFrameBufferWidth, and corrected VI prototypes.
Adjusted camera setup to use HSD_VIGetRenderMode and GXProjectionType, aligning with the new HSD_VIData shape.
Replaced extern GXRenderModeObj HSD_VIData access with HSD_VIGetRenderMode.
Updated draw-done callback to HSD_VIDrawDoneXFB and adjusted post-retrace callback signature.
Updated callsite labels to descriptive HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush and HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone.
Updated callsite labels from HSD_VICopyXFB/HSD_Video address names to HSD_VICopyXFBAsync and HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush.
Updated HSD_VICopyXFB callsite label to HSD_VICopyXFBAsync.
Updated HSD_Video_8037639C callsite label to HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush.
Updated callsite labels to HSD_VIWaitXFBFlushNoYield and HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone.

what_changed: Replaced asm/sysdolphin/baselib/video.s with a 443-line src/sysdolphin/baselib/video.c implementation and updated obj_files.mk to compile the C file.

Implemented HSD video/XFB flow in C: HSD_VISearchXFBByStatus, user pre/post retrace callbacks, GX draw-done callbacks, HSD_VIGetXFBDrawEnable, HSD_VIWaitXFBDrawEnable, HSD_VICopyEFB2XFBPtr, HSD_VICopyXFBAsync, HSD_VIDrawDoneXFB, HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush, HSD_VIWaitXFBFlushNoYield, HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone, HSD_VISetConfigure, HSD_VISetBlack, and HSD_VIInit.

Expanded video.h from a thin declaration header into the owner of concrete HSD VI state types, including HSD_VIXFBDrawDispStatus, HSD_VIEFBDrawDispStatus, HSD_VIInfo, XFB, Current, drawdone/perf substructures, callback typedefs, and inline accessors.

Renamed unknown/address-based call labels in asm and C users: HSD_Video_8037639C became HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush, HSD_Video_803764A8 became HSD_VIWaitXFBFlushNoYield, HSD_Video_803765A8 became HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone, HSD_Video_803762C4 became HSD_VIDrawDoneXFB, and HSD_VICopyXFB callsites became HSD_VICopyXFBAsync.

Corrected Dolphin GX framebuffer declarations: GXSetDispCopySrc now takes u16 left/top/width/height, GXSetDispCopyDst takes u16 width/height, GXSetCopyClear takes GXColor and u32 clear_z, GXSetCopyFilter uses typed sample/vfilter arrays, and GXCopyDisp takes a destination pointer plus GXBool clear.
Added GXFBClamp values GX_CLAMP_NONE, GX_CLAMP_TOP, and GX_CLAMP_BOTTOM for typed GXSetCopyClamp usage.

Corrected Dolphin VI declarations by adding VI TV-format constants, VIRetraceCallback, VIPadFrameBufferWidth, and typed prototypes for VIConfigure, VISetBlack, VISetNextFrameBuffer, VISetPreRetraceCallback, and VISetPostRetraceCallback.

Updated CObj camera code to stop using extern GXRenderModeObj HSD_VIData and instead use HSD_VIGetRenderMode; makeProjectionMtx now returns GXProjectionType rather than bool, and setupNormalCamera/setupTopHalfCamera/setupBottomHalfCamera return int in declarations.
Adjusted initialize.c to include baselib/video.h and use HSD_VIGetRenderMode when deriving render-mode settings for HSD_StartRender.
Adjusted gmMain_8015FDA0 to accept a u32 callback argument so it can be passed to HSD_VISetUserPostRetraceCallback with the new typed callback signature.
smart_moves: Converted video.s as a whole instead of leaving a hybrid assembly/C implementation, then made obj_files.mk perform the clean object handoff.
Used a structured HSD_VIInfo model for HSD_VIData, which made XFB/EFB statuses, callbacks, draw-done state, and performance counters explicit instead of relying on raw offsets.
Replaced address-like HSD_Video names at callsites with behavior-based names, making the newly matched video.c easier to search and safer for future callers.
Fixed dependent SDK prototypes in GXFrameBuf.h/c and vi.h rather than locally casting around mismatches in video.c.

Moved CObj and initialize users away from assuming HSD_VIData is a GXRenderModeObj; the new inline HSD_VIGetRenderMode preserves convenient access while respecting the real enclosing HSD_VIInfo layout.
Encoded callback return-old behavior and interrupt protection in the HSD_VISetUser*Callback functions, matching the low-level assembly pattern while exposing typed callback APIs.
Modeled XFB transition states with enums such as HSD_VI_XFB_DRAWING, HSD_VI_XFB_WAITDONE, HSD_VI_XFB_DRAWDONE, HSD_VI_XFB_NEXT, and HSD_VI_XFB_DISPLAY, making retrace/draw-done transitions legible.
Kept high-resolution anti-aliasing behavior explicit with HSD_ANTIALIAS_OVERLAP, HSD_ANTIALIAS_GARBAGE_SIZE, GXFBClamp usage, and VIPadFrameBufferWidth-derived buffer offset calculation.
decomp_lessons: When a matched module exposes that a global was previously typed too narrowly, fix the owning struct/header rather than preserving the fakematch. Here HSD_VIData became HSD_VIInfo, and users obtained the nested render mode through HSD_VIGetRenderMode.

SDK prototype accuracy can be a blocker for matching game code. The PR body states that correcting GXSetDispCopySrc exposed an invalid cast from a fakematch, and the diff shows broader GX/VI signature cleanup to support the video.c match.

Rename address-based symbols as soon as callsite behavior is known. Descriptive HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush, HSD_VICopyXFBAsync, and HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone names made external asm references more informative without changing branch targets.
For callback APIs, use typed function-pointer typedefs early. HSD_VIRetraceCallback and HSD_VIGXDrawDoneCallback clarified signatures and forced gmMain_8015FDA0 to accept the retrace argument.

Inline accessors in headers are useful when decompiling around a large global state object: HSD_VIGetNbXFB, HSD_VIGetXFBPtr, HSD_VIGetVIStatus, and HSD_VIGetRenderMode hid layout details while preserving C call structure.
Use enums to represent small hardware/API constants once call contexts are understood. GXFBClamp and the HSD_VI XFB/EFB status enums replaced magic status integers and clamp casts.

Matching one subsystem may require touching neighboring assembly labels only for symbol naming consistency; this PR updated asm call labels in db, gm, lb, and baselib_unknown without decompiling those files.
Camera/render setup code should use GXProjectionType for GXSetProjection rather than a bool is_ortho abstraction when the underlying SDK expects perspective/orthographic projection constants.
naming_conventions: Public baselib video APIs use the HSD_VI prefix, e.g. HSD_VIInit, HSD_VISetBlack, HSD_VICopyXFBAsync, HSD_VIWaitXFBFlush, HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone.

Internal/static helpers keep the HSD_VI prefix but are file-local when not exported, e.g. static HSD_VISearchXFBByStatus, HSD_VIPreRetraceCB, HSD_VIPostRetraceCB, HSD_VIGXDrawDoneCB, HSD_VIGetDrawDoneWaitingFlag.
Status enum names are fully prefixed and domain-scoped: HSD_VI_XFB_* for external framebuffer states and HSD_VI_EFB_* for embedded framebuffer states.
Callback typedefs state the subsystem and event type: HSD_VIRetraceCallback and HSD_VIGXDrawDoneCallback.
Render pass enum values remain HSD_RP_SCREEN, HSD_RP_TOPHALF, and HSD_RP_BOTTOMHALF.
GX framebuffer API parameters were renamed from arg-style placeholders to SDK-meaningful names such as left, top, wd, ht, dest, clear, clear_clr, and clear_z.
Former unknown HSD_Video_80376xxx symbols were replaced by descriptive action names, but evidence only supports the specific renames visible in the diff.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed the complete assembly file after introducing the C translation, then changed obj_files.mk from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/video.s.o to src/sysdolphin/baselib/video.c.o.
Preserved exact exported symbol connectivity by updating external asm call labels to the new C function names instead of leaving stale HSD_Video_80376xxx labels.
Used OSDisableInterrupts/OSRestoreInterrupts around shared callback and XFB status mutations to mirror the assembly’s critical sections.
Kept a file-local `_p` macro casting &HSD_VIData to HSD_VIInfo*, matching the style of offset-heavy original code while allowing structured field access.
Used #pragma dont_inline around HSD_VIGetDrawDoneWaitingFlag, indicating inlining control was needed for matching this helper.
In CObj, preserved matching-sensitive scaffolding with MUST_MATCH unused stack handling and retained asm versions for some camera setup functions while updating their signatures.

Changed setupNormalCamera variable structure to derive x/y scaling from HSD_VIGetRenderMode and to call GXSetScissor with explicit u32 casts, which likely helped match codegen after the HSD_VIData type correction.
Used typed casts where the SDK API wants enum-like bitmasks, e.g. GXSetCopyClamp((GXFBClamp) (GX_CLAMP_TOP | GX_CLAMP_BOTTOM)).
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that further refine HSD_VIInfo or video.h field names after PR1041.
Search for remaining HSD_Video_80376xxx address-like symbols to see whether any video functions stayed unnamed.
Audit GXFrameBuf.h and vi.h for later SDK prototype corrections that build on the GXSetDispCopySrc fakematch fix.
Look for PRs that decompile or rename baselib_unknown_002 callsites now using HSD_VIWaitXFBFlushNoYield and HSD_VIGetXFBLastDrawDone.
Check whether setupTopHalfCamera and setupBottomHalfCamera were later converted from asm to C after the HSD_VIGetRenderMode type cleanup.
